rationale: Subject home identified as the large multi-section hip-roofed structure at the base of the Kenswick Meadows Ct cul-de-sac (upper-left quadrant), with driveway curving from the cul-de-sac circle. Bounding box traced at approximately x:235–420 px, y:545–875 px (185 px wide × 330 px tall = ~39 ft × ~70 ft). The plan is L-shaped with two main hip-roof sections; an 82% fill factor applied to the gross rectangle gives ~2,250 sq ft. Roof is an all-hip style (no rake/gable ends): two principal ridges plus a connector ridge totaling ~55 ft, approximately eight hip lines at corners totaling ~102 ft, two interior valleys where sections meet totaling ~19 ft, and continuous eave lines around the full perimeter totaling ~187 ft. Confidence is moderate-low due to the oblique angle of some roof sections, partial shadowing, and uncertainty in pinpointing the exact lot boundary of 21106 among similarly styled neighboring homes on the cul-de-sac.
